titleStmt.title: SII 22.138: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 138. (A.R. No. 138 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA—10th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of 32 cows to the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷina-Mahādēva at Iṟaiyānaraiyūr alias Śōḻakēraḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, by Muḍigoṉḍāṉ Kāri alias Vīrapālaṉ a resident of Vāṇapirāṭṭi village in Vaḍanaraiyūr kūṟṟam for the merit of a certain Tillai alias Āṟāyirappōyaṉ whom he had hit with an arrow by accident and who died as a consequence.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu Āṭimāsattu malāṭāna jananāthavaḷanāṭṭup pānūṟkūṟṟattu
brahmadeyam Iṟaiyānaraiyūrāna śrīcoḻakeraḷa caturvedimaṅkalattu Ūr pākaṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa mahāde
vaṟku Innāṭṭu vaṭannaraiyūṟkūṟṟattu vāṇapirāṭṭiyilirukkum [ cantra] kuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ muṭikoṇ
ṭāṉ kāriyāna virapālaneṉ Innāṭṭu Ikkūṟṟattu Ilacciyattirukkum muktiyārpaḷḷi paṭiyaṉ tantranā
na puñcanūṟpoyaṉ makaṉ tillaiyāna Āṟāyirappoyanukkāka nāṉ tiru nun=tāviḷakku vaitta paricāvatu
nāṉ paṉṟikoṇṭu Irāppārvai veṭṭai pona Iṭattup paṉṟiyai Eyyāniṟkap piḻaittu Ita
tillaiyāna Āṟāyirappoyaṉai Ampupaṭṭup paṭṭamaiyil Ivanukku naṉṟāka Idevar koyilil nā
ṉ vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu Oṉṟukkum muppattiraṇṭu pacu śrībhaṇṭārattile Oṭukkinamaiyil
Ivanoṭukkina yippacu muppattiraṇṭu moṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu It tirunun=tāviḷak koṉṟum śandrādityavaṟ
cellakkaṭavitākak kalveṭṭivittatu Itu panmāheśvararakṣai ḥ
Digital edition of SII 22.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
